name: Phase 4 Conflict UI Test
description: Verify that creating a conflicting event shows the AI suggestion UI and allows resolving it

planSteps.description: Enter 'demo@timeora.app' into the email input field and 'TimeoraDemo123!' into the password input field
Wait for 3 seconds for the dashboard to load
Click on the input placeholder containing 'Jadwalkan sesuatu dengan AI'
Type 'Meeting A tomorrow at 12pm' into the Command Bar input field
Wait for 5 seconds for the AI to parse the request and the Event Dialog to appear
Click the 'Save Event' button to save Meeting A
Click on the input placeholder containing 'Jadwalkan sesuatu dengan AI' again
Type 'Meeting B tomorrow at 12pm' into the Command Bar input field
Wait for 5 seconds for the AI to parse the request and the Event Dialog to appear
Click the 'Save Event' button to save Meeting B
Verify that the warning text 'Jadwal Bentrok!' is visible on the screen
Click on the first button under 'Saran AI (Slot Kosong)'
Verify that the warning text 'Jadwal Bentrok!' disappears and the Start Time input has changed
